center.name: Broomehill, Western Australia
center.summary: Broomehill, Western Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Gilbert's honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gilbert's honeyeater is found in the southwest corner of Western Australia, where it ranges from Moora in the north, through the jarrah forest belt to Broomehill, the Stirling Range and along the coast to Stokes Inlet.{{cite book |title=Birds of Western Australia |author1=Serventy, D.L
